rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, February 29, 2016, Line 9. DEFENDANT TAFFI VASQUEZ, JIMMY ZARUR MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER is Denied; Court finds Moving party failed to shift the burden. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHUKRY S. AZAR VS. MARTHA RODRIGUEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendants' Notice And Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, February 29, 2016, Line 10. DEFENDANT MARTHA RODRIGUEZ, PABLO RODRIGUEZ MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendants' Notice And Motion For Summary Judgment is GRANTED. Failure to include all properties owned by the "landlord" as defined by SFRO 37.2(h) and SFRO 37.9(a)(8)(iii), renders the Notice fatally defective and Defendants are entitled to summary judgment. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JACQUELINE WARRINGTON VS. YADIRA JOHNSTON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, February 29, 2016, Line 8 ( Part 2 of 2). DEFENDANT YADIRA JOHNSTON, JOSE CHAMORRO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges cause of action for unlawful detainer. Moving party improperly raises issues of fact. Request for Sanctions is DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CCP 128.5(f). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JACQUELINE WARRINGTON VS. YADIRA JOHNSTON ET AL
